paragraph:
# Velmoria's first parliament

*An (amiable) start, a task for the (indefatigable), and the (inexplicable) habit of hope*

LET THIS chapter open not with a (dirge) but with something close to (bonhomie). Velmoria's first freely elected parliament has convened, and the new members—an (eclectic), faintly (gauche) (coterie) of farmers, lawyers and former exiles—filed into the restored chamber—past its anteroom (lounge), still smelling of fresh paint—with a mixture of (panache) and nerves. The (morale), against all odds, is high. The (cliché) that the country was (irredeemable), once repeated as gospel, has proved happily (untenable).

The agenda is (formidable) and barely (tractable). The treasury must (discharge) old debts or (expunge) the most (inexpiable) of them; a punitive (surcharge) levied by the marshal must be repealed; the bloated security service must be (purge)d—carefully, lest the (purge) itself become a new (scourge). Members debate whether amnesty for the old regime's crimes is (justifiable) or the crimes wholly (irredeemable), whether reconciliation is (viable) or the wounds simply (irreconcilable). The arguments (diverge) sharply, yet the chamber remains, for now, (amenable) to compromise.

Not every gesture is sincere. A faction of ex-loyalists, (affable) in public and (disagreeable) in private, deploys (subterfuge) at every turn—a procedural (gauche)rie here, a buried (cache) of old contracts there, a (pastiche) of reform dressed over reaction. Their (gaucherie) would be comic were the stakes not so high. They (vie) for committee seats with the persistence of a (magpie) after silver, and more than one honest motion has been (stymie)d by their manoeuvres. The Speaker, an (imperturbable) and (impeccable) old jurist, refuses to bend the rules to stop them—that would (belie) everything the new order claims to be; the process, she insists, must be (inviolable) even when (inconvenient).

The reform programme is being assembled piece by piece, and its drafters are (indefatigable). Each clause must be (serviceable), (applicable), and—above all—(enforceable). They distinguish the (explicable) errors of the past from the (inexplicable) ones, the (remediable) harms from the (irremediable). Some old statutes are so (malleable) they can be amended; others are beyond mending—(irrevocable)ly flawed—and must be struck out whole. The constitution they hope to (forge) must be (inalienable) in its core freedoms yet (amenable) to honest revision—neither (friable) enough to crumble nor so rigid as to become (nonviable).

There is symbolism, too, and the new state wields it with more restraint than the old. Where the marshal would (splurge) on spectacle, parliament marked its opening with a single, (estimable) gesture: the planting of a (lithe) young tree in the courtyard, watched by a (blithe) crowd that did not need to be ordered to cheer. No one read a bombastic (apostrophe) to the nation; no choir was made to (regale) a (hale) and beaming dictator. The old reflex to (convoke) the masses and (evoke) grand emotion has given way to something quieter and more (tenable).

The work is (perishable), of course—democracies are (permeable) to bad actors and never wholly (impermeable) to corruption. A (gale) of populist anger could yet (resurge); the public's appetite for results is (insatiable) one month, its patience (inappreciable) the next. Ministers know that, in the public mind, morale is (interchangeable) with delivery—the one read as a proxy for the other: govern well and the (psyche) of the nation will (slake) its thirst for stability; govern badly and the whole (locale) could slide back toward melodrama. They cannot afford to (loathe) their critics or (yoke) dissent; an (amicable), (sociable) tolerance of disagreement is the only (viable) path.

So they (stoke) the slow fires of institution-building rather than (spike) the public mood with easy wins. They (hike) the unglamorous hills of administration, (forge) workable rules in the fire of debate and finish them on the cold (lathe) of committee, and (wreathe) no leader in the laurels the marshal craved. The (finale) of his story—a spent old man, his menace long since (discharge)d—offers a permanent, (ineffaceable) warning. His legend was always a (subterfuge); his (utopia), a (mirage).

What replaces it is not perfect and never will be. But it is (tenable), and it is theirs. The marshal's reign was a (saga) of one man's (irreconcilable) appetite for power. Its sequel, written now in the plain (prose) of committee minutes and (serviceable) law, belongs to a (multitude) who have learned the hardest and most (amiable) lesson of all: that freedom is not a (panacea) handed down, but an (indefatigable) habit, practised daily, by people who have finally chosen to govern themselves.
text:
本批词根亮点：

• -able/-ible 大家族：本批涵盖大量 -able 词汇，全来自拉丁 -abilis（能够的），表示"可以被...的"，前缀决定含义：in-/ir-/il- 表示否定

• ineffable：in（否定）+ effable（可说的），ef+fari（说），无法说出的=难以言表，infant（婴儿=不会说话）同根

• indefatigable：in（否定）+ de + fatigare（使疲倦），不知疲倦的，fatigue（疲劳）同根

• malleable：来自拉丁 malleus（锤子），可以被锤打成形的=可塑的，mallet（木槌）同根

• viable/nonviable：来自拉丁 vita（生命），能够存活的，vital（生命的）/vitamin（维生素）同根

• panache：来自法语"羽毛"（plume），骑士头盔上的羽饰=神采风度，原指勇气的象征

• subterfuge：subter（在下面）+ fug（逃）来自拉丁 fugere，从下面逃脱=诡计，fugitive（逃犯）同根

• gauche/gaucherie：法语"左边的"，left-handed=笨拙的，和英语 sinister（左=邪恶）有相同的文化偏见

quiz.question: _____ lounge
quiz.explanation: 休息室，酒店休息室。Guests gathered in the hotel lounge. 客人们聚集在酒店休息室。 | lounge->懒散躺（来源不明，可能来自French longis->懒汉），lounge->休息/休息室（cf. lounge about闲逛，lounge chair躺椅，lobby大厅）

quiz.question: expunge ___ ______
quiz.explanation: 删除，删除记录。The court agreed to expunge the record. 法院同意删除记录。 | ex->向外，pung->刺（拉丁pungere），expunge->刺出去=删除（cf. pungent刺激性的，puncture刺穿，punctuation标点，compunction懊悔）

quiz.question: ____ surcharge
quiz.explanation: 附加费，燃油附加费。Airlines added a fuel surcharge to tickets. 航空公司在机票上增加了燃油附加费。 | sur->超过，charge->负担（法语charger），surcharge->超出的负担=附加费（cf. charge费用，discharge解除，overcharge多收费）

quiz.question: _________ discharge
quiz.explanation: 解雇，光荣退伍。The soldier received an honorable discharge. 士兵获得了光荣退伍。 | dis->去除，charge->负担/责任，discharge->去除责任=免职/退伍（cf. charge负担，recharge充电，surcharge附加费，charger充电器）

quiz.question: _____ diverge
quiz.explanation: 分歧，道路分歧。The paths diverge at the fork. 道路在岔口分歧。 | di->分开，verg->转（拉丁vergere->倾斜），diverge->向不同方向转=分歧（cf. converge汇聚，verge边缘，subvert颠覆，convert转变）

quiz.question: _______ dirge
quiz.explanation: 挽歌，葬礼挽歌。The choir sang a somber funeral dirge. 合唱团唱了一首庄严的葬礼挽歌。 | dirge->来自拉丁 Dirige（引导，葬礼弥撒开头词），dirge->哀悼歌曲（cf. direct指导，director导演，dirigible飞艇=可引导的）

quiz.question: forge _ _________
quiz.explanation: 伪造，伪造签名。It is illegal to forge a signature. 伪造签名是非法的。 | forge->铁匠铺（拉丁fabrica），forge->在铁匠铺锻造/伪造（cf. fabricate捏造，fabric布料，forge ahead奋力前进，forgery伪造）

quiz.question: splurge ________
quiz.explanation: 挥霍，挥霍购物。She decided to splurge shopping during the sale. 她决定在促销期间挥霍购物。 | splurge->挥霍（来源不明，可能是splash+surge的混合），splurge->大肆花钱（cf. surge涌浪，splash飞溅，spend花钱，extravagant奢侈）

quiz.question: scourge __ ___
quiz.explanation: 灾祸，战争灾祸。The scourge of war affected millions. 战争灾祸影响了数百万人。 | scourge->鞭子（古法语escorgier->用皮带打），scourge->鞭打/灾难（cf. scourge鞭刑，plague瘟疫/灾害，blight灾害，curse诅咒）

quiz.question: purge _______
quiz.explanation: 清除，清除记录。The company would purge records annually. 公司每年会清除记录。 | purg->净化（拉丁purgare），purge->清洗净化=清除（cf. purify净化，pure纯，expurgate删除，purgatory炼狱=清洗之地）

quiz.question: resurge __ __________
quiz.explanation: 复兴，复兴流行。Vinyl records would resurge in popularity. 黑胶唱片会复兴流行。 | re->再次，surge->涌起（拉丁surgere），resurge->再次涌起=复兴（cf. surge涌浪，insurgent叛乱者，resurgence复兴，resurrection复活）

quiz.question: ____ gauge
quiz.explanation: 仪表，燃油仪表。Check the fuel gauge before driving. 驾驶前检查燃油仪表。 | gauge->测量工具（古北法语gauger->测量桶容量），gauge->测量仪器（cf. standard gauge标准轨距，rain gauge雨量计，gauge压力表）

quiz.question: ____ __ subterfuge
quiz.explanation: 诡计，诡计的策略。His claim was just a ploy of subterfuge. 他的声明只是诡计的策略。 | subter->在下面（拉丁），fuge->逃（拉丁fugere），subterfuge->从下面逃脱=诡计（cf. fugitive逃犯，refugee难民，centrifuge离心机，refuge避难所）

quiz.question: ______ cache
quiz.explanation: 藏匿处，秘密藏匿处。They discovered a secret cache of weapons. 他们发现了秘密藏匿处武器。 | cacher->隐藏（法语），cache->隐藏的储存处（cf. cache缓存，stash藏匿，cache memory缓存，conceal隐藏）

quiz.question: ___ _ _____ __ panache
quiz.explanation: 神气，增添一丝神气。She would add a touch of panache to every outfit. 她会为每套服装增添一丝神气。 | pennacchio->羽毛（意大利语，拉丁penna->羽毛），panache->头盔羽饰=风度/神气（cf. pen钢笔=羽毛管，pinnacle顶峰，panache风采）

quiz.question: _____ cliché
quiz.explanation: 陈词滥调，陈腐的陈词滥调。The speech was full of stale cliché. 演讲充满了陈腐的陈词滥调。 | clicher->铸造铅版（法语印刷术语），cliché->被过度印刷的文字=陈词滥调（cf. stereotype铅版印刷/刻板印象，platitude陈词，hackneyed陈腐）

quiz.question: ______ niche
quiz.explanation: 利基，市场利基。The company found a profitable market niche. 公司找到了有利可图的市场利基。 | niche->壁龛（法语nicher->筑巢，拉丁nidus->巢），niche->刚好合适的位置（cf. nest巢，niche利基市场，nidus病灶，recess凹处）

quiz.question: ________ pastiche
quiz.explanation: 模仿作品，艺术模仿作品。The film was an artistic pastiche of noir classics. 这部电影是黑色经典的艺术模仿作品。 | pasticcio->馅饼（意大利语，混杂物），pastiche->混合多种风格的艺术作品（cf. paste粘贴，pastry糕点，pasta意面，hodgepodge大杂烩）

quiz.question: ____ avalanche
quiz.explanation: 雪崩，雪崩。The snow avalanche buried the village. 雪崩掩埋了村庄。 | avaler->吞咽（法语，拉丁ad+vallem->向山谷），avalanche->山谷向下吞咽=雪崩（cf. valley山谷，vale山谷，avalanche effect雪崩效应）

quiz.question: ______ gauche
quiz.explanation: 笨拙的，社交笨拙的。His social gauche behavior embarrassed everyone. 他社交笨拙的行为让每个人都尴尬。 | gauche->左边（法语），gauche->左手的=笨拙的（cf. gaucherie笨拙，sinister左=邪恶，adroit右手=灵巧，dexterity右手=灵巧）

quiz.question: _____ psyche
quiz.explanation: 心灵，人类心灵。The study explored the human psyche. 这项研究探索了人类心灵。 | psyche->灵魂（希腊，Psyche=被厄洛斯爱上的少女），psyche->心灵（cf. psychology心理学，psychosis精神病，psychiatry精神病学，Eros厄洛斯）

quiz.question: ___ apostrophe
quiz.explanation: 撇号，使用撇号。Remember to use apostrophe in contractions. 记得在缩写中使用撇号。 | apo->离开，stroph->转（希腊），apostrophe->转向呼喊/撇号（cf. apostrophe'撇号，catastrophe灾难=向下转，strophe诗节，apostasy背教）

quiz.question: wreathe __ ______
quiz.explanation: 环绕，笑容环绕。Her face would wreathe in smiles. 她的脸会笑容环绕。 | wreathe->缠绕（古英语wrīthan），wreathe->环绕包围（cf. wreath花圈，writhe扭动，wring拧，writhing扭曲挣扎）

quiz.question: ____ lathe
quiz.explanation: 车床，木工车床。The craftsman used a wood lathe. 工匠使用木工车床。 | lathe->车床（古挪威hlath->结构），lathe->旋转加工的机床（cf. lathe车床，lather泡沫，lath木条，lathe turning车削加工）

quiz.question: loathe __ _____
quiz.explanation: 厌恶，厌恶承认。He was loathe to admit his mistake. 他厌恶承认自己的错误。 | loathe->厌恶（古英语lāthian），loathe->强烈厌恶（cf. loathsome令人厌恶，loth不情愿的，detest憎恨，abhor憎恶）

quiz.question: lithe ______
quiz.explanation: 柔软的，柔软的身材。The dancer had a lithe figure. 舞者有柔软的身材。 | lithe->柔软（古英语lithe->温和），lithe->柔韧优美的（cf. lissome柔软，supple柔韧，lithe and lissome柔软灵活，agile敏捷）

quiz.question: blithe ______
quiz.explanation: 无忧无虑的，无忧无虑的精神。She had a blithe spirit that charmed everyone. 她有无忧无虑的精神迷住了每个人。 | blithe->快乐（古英语blīthe->快乐），blithe->无忧无虑轻快的（cf. bliss极乐，blissful幸福，merry快乐，blithe disregard漫不经心）

quiz.question: _____ scythe
quiz.explanation: 镰刀，锋利的镰刀。The farmer used a sharp scythe to cut wheat. 农民用锋利的镰刀割麦子。 | sigotha->镰刀（古英语，来自日耳曼语），scythe->割草的大镰刀（cf. sickle小镰刀，Grim Reaper死神持镰刀，mow割草）

quiz.question: belie ___ _____
quiz.explanation: 掩饰，掩饰声明。The facts belie the claim. 事实掩饰声明。 | be->使，lie->说谎，belie->让...显得是谎言=与...矛盾（cf. lie谎言，belie contradicts，belie one's appearance与外表不符）

quiz.question: bonhomie ___ ______
quiz.explanation: 友善，友善和温暖。He greeted everyone with bonhomie and warmth. 他以友善和温暖迎接每个人。 | bon->好（法语），homme->男人，bonhomie->好男人的气质=友善（cf. bonbon糖果=好的好的，bona fide真诚，bonus奖金，bonhomous友善）

quiz.question: stymie ________
quiz.explanation: 阻碍，阻碍进展。Bureaucracy would stymie progress. 官僚主义会阻碍进展。 | stymie->高尔夫球术语（对手球挡路），stymie->阻碍（cf. obstruct阻碍，thwart阻挠，hamper妨碍，impede阻碍）

quiz.question: magpie __________
quiz.explanation: 喜鹊，喜鹊收集。She had a habit of magpie collecting shiny objects. 她有喜鹊收集闪亮物品的习惯。 | Mag->Margaret的昵称，pie->喜鹊（法语pie），magpie->玛格丽特的鸟=喜鹊（cf. pie馅饼/喜鹊，pied杂色，piebald花斑，chatty爱说话如喜鹊）

quiz.question: ______ gaucherie
quiz.explanation: 笨拙，社交笨拙。His social gaucherie was obvious. 他的社交笨拙很明显。 | gauche->左边（法语），gaucherie->左手的笨拙（cf. gauche笨拙，sinister左/邪，adroit灵巧，maladroit笨拙=mal+adroit）

quiz.question: _____ coterie
quiz.explanation: 小圈子，精英小圈子。An elite coterie controlled the organization. 精英小圈子控制着该组织。 | cote->小屋（法语，拉丁cotes），coterie->共用小屋的人=小圈子（cf. cabal阴谋小团体，clique小圈子，enclave飞地，coterie排外小团）

quiz.question: calorie ______
quiz.explanation: 卡路里，卡路里摄入量。Monitor your calorie intake for health. 监控你的卡路里摄入量以保持健康。 | calor->热（拉丁），calorie->热量单位（cf. caloric热量的，calorific产热的，scald烫伤，caldron大锅，nonchalance漠不关心=不热）

quiz.question: vie ___ ________
quiz.explanation: 竞争，竞争位置。Candidates vie for position in the race. 候选人竞争位置在竞选中。 | vie->竞争（法语envier->挑战），vie->争夺竞争（cf. rival竞争对手，compete竞争，contend争夺，vie for争夺）

quiz.question: slake ___'_ ______
quiz.explanation: 解渴，解渴。Cold water would slake one's thirst. 冷水会解渴。 | slacken->松弛（古英语sleacian），slake->使松弛=解渴（cf. slack松弛，slacken松弛，slake解渴，allay缓解）

quiz.question: stake _ _____
quiz.explanation: 立桩，立桩声明。The prospectors would stake a claim. 勘探者会立桩声明。 | stake->木桩（古英语staca），stake->打桩/权益（cf. stake桩/权益，at stake处于危险，steak牛排=烤在桩上，stockholder股东）

quiz.question: _____ hike
quiz.explanation: 上涨，价格上涨。The company announced a price hike. 公司宣布价格上涨。 | hike->徒步（来源不明，方言），hike->长途行走/提高（cf. hike prices提价，hiker徒步者，trek跋涉，price hike涨价）

quiz.question: spike __ _____
quiz.explanation: 激增，病例激增。There was a spike in cases last month. 上个月病例激增。 | spike->尖顶（古挪威spik->钉），spike->尖峰/激增（cf. spike尖峰，spire尖塔，spindle纺锤，spiky尖锐的）

quiz.question: _____ spoke
quiz.explanation: 辐条，车轮辐条。A wheel spoke was broken. 车轮辐条断了。 | spoke->辐条（古英语spaca），spoke->轮毂到轮缘的支撑条（cf. spoke辐条，hub轮毂，wheel轮，put a spoke in one's wheel阻碍某人）

quiz.question: stoke _ ____
quiz.explanation: 添柴，添柴生火。He would stoke a fire throughout the night. 他整夜都会添柴生火。 | stoker->炉工（荷兰语stoken->拨火），stoke->向炉中添燃料（cf. stoker司炉，stoke enthusiasm激发热情，stoke a fire添柴）

quiz.question: evoke _______
quiz.explanation: 唤起，唤起情感。The music would evoke emotion. 音乐会唤起情感。 | e->向外，voc->声音（拉丁vocare->呼唤），evoke->呼唤出来=唤起（cf. invoke调用，provoke激怒，revoke撤销，vocal声音的，vocation职业）

quiz.question: convoke _ _______
quiz.explanation: 召集，召集会议。The chairman would convoke a meeting. 主席会召集会议。 | con->共同，voc->呼唤，convoke->共同呼唤=召集（cf. invoke调用，revoke撤销，evoke唤起，provoke激怒，vocabulary词汇）

quiz.question: yoke ________
quiz.explanation: 束缚，束缚在一起。The oxen were yoked together. 牛被束缚在一起。 | yogam->结合（梵语，也是yoga瑜伽的词源），yoke->连接两头牲畜的木架（cf. yoga瑜伽=结合，jugular颈静脉=轭下，conjugal夫妻的=共同轭）

quiz.question: _____ rebuke
quiz.explanation: 斥责，严厉的斥责。The teacher gave a sharp rebuke. 老师给予了严厉的斥责。 | re->再次，buke->打击（古北法语bucher->砍），rebuke->再次打击=斥责（cf. reprimand训斥，reprove责备，censure谴责，upbraid斥责）

quiz.question: _______ locale
quiz.explanation: 地点，旅游地点。The town was a popular tourist locale. 这个镇是受欢迎的旅游地点。 | locus->地方（拉丁），locale->特定地方（cf. local当地，location位置，locate定位，locus焦点/场所，in loco parentis代为监护）

quiz.question: gale _______
quiz.explanation: 大风，大风警报。The weather service issued a gale warning. 气象局发布了大风警报。 | gale->大风（来源不明，可能古挪威galinn->疯狂），gale->强风（cf. gale-force风力，breeze微风，gust阵风，tempest暴风）

quiz.question: regale ______
quiz.explanation: 款待，款待客人。The host would regale guests with stories. 主人会用故事款待客人。 | re->再次，gale->欢乐（法语régaler），regale->以欢乐待客=款待（cf. regal皇家的，royal皇室，gala庆典，regalia王室礼服）

quiz.question: hale ___ ______
quiz.explanation: 健壮的，健壮和精神饱满。He remained hale and hearty in old age. 他在老年保持健壮和精神饱满。 | hale->健康（古英语hal），hale->健壮（cf. whole整体，health健康，heal治愈，hale and hearty老当益壮，whole=hale）

quiz.question: inhale ______
quiz.explanation: 吸入，深深吸入。Inhale deeply to relax. 深深吸入以放松。 | in->进入，hal->呼吸（拉丁halare），inhale->吸气进入（cf. exhale呼气，halitosis口臭=呼气有味，inhaler吸入器）

quiz.question: shale ___
quiz.explanation: 页岩，页岩气。Shale gas extraction is controversial. 页岩气开采存在争议。 | shale->页岩（古英语scealu->壳），shale->片状沉积岩（cf. shell壳，scale鳞/刻度，shale oil页岩油，fracking水力压裂）

quiz.question: _____ finale
quiz.explanation: 终曲，宏大的终曲。The concert ended with a grand finale. 音乐会以宏大的终曲结束。 | finale->最终（意大利语，拉丁finalis），finale->最后的乐章（cf. final最终，finish结束，fine结束，finish line终点线，finally最终）

quiz.question: _____ morale
quiz.explanation: 士气，提高士气。The victory would boost morale. 胜利会提高士气。 | morale->道德/士气（法语，拉丁moralis），morale->集体的精神状态=士气（cf. moral道德，morale士气，morality道德，immoral不道德）

quiz.question: imperturbable ____
quiz.explanation: 沉着的，沉着的冷静。He maintained imperturbable calm. 他保持沉着的冷静。 | im->否定，per->彻底，turb->搅动（拉丁turbare），imperturbable->无法被搅动的=沉着的（cf. perturb扰乱，turbulent湍急，disturb打扰）

quiz.question: impeccable _____
quiz.explanation: 无可挑剔的，无可挑剔的品味。She had impeccable taste in fashion. 她在时尚方面有无可挑剔的品味。 | im->否定，pecc->犯罪（拉丁peccare->犯罪），impeccable->无法犯罪的=无可挑剔的（cf. peccadillo小罪，peculate贪污，impeccant无罪）

quiz.question: irradicable ____
quiz.explanation: 根深蒂固的，根深蒂固的偏见。The irradicable bias affected decisions. 根深蒂固的偏见影响了决定。 | ir->否定，radic->根（拉丁radix），irradicable->无法连根拔除的（cf. radical根本，eradicate根除，radish萝卜，radix词根）

quiz.question: applicable ___
quiz.explanation: 适用的，适用的法律。The applicable law was unclear. 适用的法律不明确。 | ap->朝向，plic->折叠（拉丁plicare），applicable->可以折叠应用的=适用的（cf. apply应用，imply暗示，complicate使复杂，duplicate复制）

quiz.question: explicable ______
quiz.explanation: 可解释的，可解释的原因。There must be an explicable reason. 必须有可解释的原因。 | ex->向外，plic->折叠，explicable->可以展开说明的=可解释的（cf. explain解释，explicit明确，explicate阐明，implicate牵涉）

quiz.question: inexplicable _____
quiz.explanation: 无法解释的，无法解释的事件。The inexplicable event puzzled scientists. 无法解释的事件困扰着科学家。 | in->否定，explicable->可解释的，inexplicable->无法解释的（cf. mysterious神秘，baffling令人困惑，unfathomable深不可测）

quiz.question: amicable __________
quiz.explanation: 友好的，友好的和解。They reached an amicable settlement. 他们达成了友好的和解。 | amic->朋友（拉丁amicus），amicable->朋友般的=友好的（cf. amiable和蔼，amity友好，enemy敌人=非朋友，amicable divorce友好离婚）

quiz.question: ______ extricable
quiz.explanation: 可解脱的，容易可解脱的。The problem was easily extricable. 这个问题是容易可解脱的。 | ex->向外，tric->障碍（拉丁tricae->纠纷），extricable->可以从障碍中脱出的（cf. extricate解脱，intricate复杂=内部障碍，inextricable无法解脱）

quiz.question: irrevocable ________
quiz.explanation: 不可撤销的，不可撤销的决定。He made an irrevocable decision. 他做出了不可撤销的决定。 | ir->否定，re->回，voc->呼唤（拉丁vocare），irrevocable->无法呼唤回来的=不可撤销（cf. revoke撤销，invoke调用，evoke唤起，vocal声音的）

quiz.question: affordable _______
quiz.explanation: 负担得起的，负担得起的住房。The city needs more affordable housing. 城市需要更多负担得起的住房。 | afford->能够提供（古英语geforthian->实现），affordable->能够承担的（cf. afford负担，unaffordable负担不起，can afford有能力）

quiz.question: ineffaceable __________
quiz.explanation: 不可磨灭的，不可磨灭的印象。She left an ineffaceable impression. 她留下了不可磨灭的印象。 | in->否定，efface->抹去（拉丁）ineffaceable->无法抹去的（cf. efface抹去，face面，deface损坏，indelible不可磨灭）

quiz.question: traceable ______
quiz.explanation: 可追溯的，可追溯的来源。The problem had a traceable source. 问题有可追溯的来源。 | trace->追踪（法语tracer，拉丁tractus），traceable->可以被追踪的（cf. trace追踪，retrace重走，track轨迹，traction牵引）

quiz.question: serviceable _________
quiz.explanation: 可用的，可用的状态。The car was in serviceable condition. 汽车处于可用的状态。 | service->服务（拉丁servitium），serviceable->可以提供服务的=可用的（cf. serve服务，servant仆人，server服务器，servile奴性的）

quiz.question: agreeable _______
quiz.explanation: 宜人的，宜人的气候。The region had an agreeable climate. 该地区有宜人的气候。 | agree->同意（法语agréer），agreeable->令人愉快可同意的=宜人的（cf. agree同意，agreement协议，disagree不同意，agreeable宜人）

quiz.question: disagreeable ____
quiz.explanation: 令人不快的，令人不快的气味。A disagreeable odor filled the room. 令人不快的气味充满了房间。 | dis->否定，agreeable->宜人的，disagreeable->不宜人的（cf. unpleasant不愉快，disagreeable令人不快，nasty令人不快）

quiz.question: interchangeable _____
quiz.explanation: 可互换的，可互换的零件。The machine used interchangeable parts. 机器使用可互换的零件。 | inter->互相，change->交换，interchangeable->可以互相交换的（cf. exchange交换，change变化，interchange互换，replaceable可替换）

quiz.question: malleable _____
quiz.explanation: 可塑的，可塑的金属。Gold is a malleable metal. 黄金是可塑的金属。 | malleus->锤子（拉丁），malleable->可以被锤打成形的（cf. mallet木槌，mall购物中心=用锤球的地方，maul重击，pliable柔韧）

quiz.question: permeable ________
quiz.explanation: 可渗透的，可渗透的膜。The permeable membrane allows water through. 可渗透的膜允许水通过。 | per->穿越，meable->穿过（拉丁meare->流过），permeable->可以穿越的（cf. impermeable不透水，permeate渗透，semipermeable半透膜）

quiz.question: impermeable ________
quiz.explanation: 不透水的，不透水的膜。The impermeable membrane blocked all moisture. 不透水的膜阻止了所有湿气。 | im->否定，permeable->可渗透的，impermeable->不可渗透的（cf. waterproof防水，watertight不透水，permeable可渗透）

quiz.question: affable ____
quiz.explanation: 和蔼可亲的，和蔼可亲的主人。The affable host welcomed everyone. 和蔼可亲的主人欢迎每个人。 | af->朝向，fable->说话（拉丁fari），affable->容易被说话接近的=和蔼可亲的（cf. fable寓言，infant婴儿=不说话，ineffable难言的，fabulous神奇的）

quiz.question: ineffable ___
quiz.explanation: 难以言表的，难以言表的喜悦。She experienced ineffable joy. 她经历了难以言表的喜悦。 | in->否定，ef->向外，fable->说（拉丁fari），ineffable->无法说出的=难以言表的（cf. affable和蔼=可说话的，infant婴儿，fable寓言）

quiz.question: indefatigable ______
quiz.explanation: 不知疲倦的，不知疲倦的工人。He was an indefatigable worker. 他是不知疲倦的工人。 | in->否定，de->彻底，fatig->使疲惫（拉丁fatigare），indefatigable->无法疲倦的（cf. fatigue疲劳，fatigued疲惫，tireless不知疲倦）

quiz.question: unimpeachable ______
quiz.explanation: 无可指责的，无可指责的来源。The information came from an unimpeachable source. 信息来自无可指责的来源。 | un->否定，im->对着，peach->告发（古法语empêcher），unimpeachable->无法告发挑剔的（cf. impeach弹劾，peach告密，impeccable无可挑剔）

quiz.question: perishable _____
quiz.explanation: 易腐的，易腐的商品。Store perishable goods in the refrigerator. 将易腐的商品存放在冰箱中。 | per->彻底，ish->消亡（拉丁perire->消失），perishable->容易消失消亡的（cf. perish消亡，imperishable不朽，perishing极冷的）

quiz.question: appreciable __________
quiz.explanation: 可察觉的，可察觉的差异。There was an appreciable difference. 有可察觉的差异。 | ap->朝向，preci->价值（拉丁pretium），appreciable->可以评估价值的=可察觉的（cf. appreciate欣赏，precious珍贵，appraise评估，depreciate贬值）

quiz.question: inappreciable ______
quiz.explanation: 微不足道的，微不足道的变化。The inappreciable change went unnoticed. 微不足道的变化未被注意到。 | in->否定，appreciable->可察觉的，inappreciable->无法察觉的（cf. imperceptible难以察觉，negligible可忽略，trifling微不足道）

quiz.question: sociable ______
quiz.explanation: 好交际的，好交际的本性。He had a sociable nature. 他有好交际的本性。 | socius->伙伴（拉丁），sociable->喜欢与伙伴交往的（cf. social社交，society社会，sociable好交际，asocial不合群，sociology社会学）

quiz.question: irremediable ____
quiz.explanation: 无法补救的，无法补救的伤害。The accident caused irremediable harm. 事故造成了无法补救的伤害。 | ir->否定，remedi->补救（拉丁remedium），irremediable->无法补救的（cf. remedy补救，remedial补救的，irreparable无法修复，irrevocable不可撤销）

quiz.question: justifiable ________
quiz.explanation: 正当的，正当的杀人。The court ruled it was justifiable homicide. 法院裁定这是正当的杀人。 | just->公正（拉丁justus），justifiable->可以证明公正的=正当的（cf. justify证明正当，justice正义，adjust调整，unjustifiable不正当）

quiz.question: pliable ________
quiz.explanation: 柔韧的，柔韧的材料。The pliable material bent easily. 柔韧的材料容易弯曲。 | pli->折叠（法语plier->弯曲，拉丁plicare），pliable->可以折叠弯曲的（cf. apply应用，comply遵守，supple柔软，pliant柔韧）

quiz.question: amiable ___________
quiz.explanation: 和蔼可亲的，和蔼可亲的性格。She had an amiable personality. 她有和蔼可亲的性格。 | amic->朋友（拉丁amicus），amiable->像朋友一样的=和蔼可亲的（cf. amity友好，amicable友好，amiability和蔼，amour爱情）

quiz.question: inexpiable _____
quiz.explanation: 无法赎罪的，无法赎罪的罪行。He felt inexpiable guilt. 他感到无法赎罪的罪行。 | in->否定，expi->赎罪（拉丁expiare->补偿），inexpiable->无法赎罪的（cf. expiate赎罪，expiation赎罪，atonement赎罪，piety虔诚）

quiz.question: friable ____
quiz.explanation: 易碎的，易碎的土壤。The friable soil crumbled easily. 易碎的土壤容易碎裂。 | friare->揉碎（拉丁），friable->容易揉碎的=易碎的（cf. friction摩擦，friable易碎，crumble碎裂，brittle脆，fragile脆弱）

quiz.question: insatiable ________
quiz.explanation: 贪得无厌的，贪得无厌的食欲。He had an insatiable appetite for knowledge. 他对知识有贪得无厌的食欲。 | in->否定，sati->足够（拉丁satis），insatiable->无法满足的（cf. satisfy满足，satiate使饱足，saturate饱和，sate满足）

quiz.question: viable ____
quiz.explanation: 可行的，可行的计划。They developed a viable plan. 他们制定了可行的计划。 | via->生命（拉丁vita），viable->能够存活的=可行的（cf. vita生命，vital生命的，vitamin维生素，vivid生动，revive复活）

quiz.question: nonviable ______
quiz.explanation: 不能存活的，不能存活的胚胎。The nonviable embryo could not develop. 不能存活的胚胎无法发育。 | non->否定，viable->可存活的，nonviable->不能存活的（cf. viable可行，vita生命，inviable不能存活，embryo胚胎）

quiz.question: irreconcilable ___________
quiz.explanation: 不可调和的，不可调和的分歧。They had irreconcilable differences. 他们有不可调和的分歧。 | ir->否定，reconcile->和解（拉丁reconciliare->重新结合），irreconcilable->无法和解的（cf. reconcile和解，conciliate安抚，council议会）

quiz.question: inviolable ______
quiz.explanation: 不可侵犯的，不可侵犯的权利。Human dignity is an inviolable rights. 人的尊严是不可侵犯的权利。 | in->否定，viol->侵犯（拉丁violare），inviolable->不可侵犯的（cf. violate侵犯，violence暴力，violet紫罗兰，inviolate未被侵犯的）

quiz.question: irredeemable ____
quiz.explanation: 无法挽回的，无法挽回的债务。The company faced irredeemable debt. 公司面临无法挽回的债务。 | ir->否定，redeem->赎回（拉丁redimere），irredeemable->无法赎回的（cf. redeem赎回，redemption救赎，ransom赎金，redeeming救赎的）

quiz.question: estimable _________
quiz.explanation: 值得尊敬的，值得尊敬的品格。He was known for his estimable character. 他以值得尊敬的品格闻名。 | estim->评估（拉丁aestimare），estimable->值得被正面评估的=值得尊敬的（cf. estimate估计，esteem尊重，inestimable无价的）

quiz.question: flammable ______
quiz.explanation: 易燃的，易燃的液体。Store flammable liquid carefully. 小心存放易燃的液体。 | flamm->火焰（拉丁flamma），flammable->容易被点燃的（注意flammable与inflammable同义，cf. flame火焰，flamboyant炫耀，inflame点燃）

quiz.question: nonflammable ________
quiz.explanation: 不易燃的，不易燃的材料。Use nonflammable material for safety. 为了安全使用不易燃的材料。 | non->否定，flammable->易燃的，nonflammable->不易燃的（cf. fireproof防火，fire-resistant阻燃，inflammable=flammable易燃）

quiz.question: presumable _____
quiz.explanation: 可推测的，可推测的原因。The presumable cause was equipment failure. 可推测的原因是设备故障。 | pre->之前，sum->拿取（拉丁sumere），presumable->可以提前拿取结论的=可推测的（cf. presume推测，assume假设，consume消耗，resume恢复）

quiz.question: inalienable ______
quiz.explanation: 不可剥夺的，不可剥夺的权利。All people have inalienable rights. 所有人都有不可剥夺的权利。 | in->否定，alien->外来（拉丁alienus->他人的），inalienable->无法转让给他人的（cf. alienate疏远，alien外来，alienation疏离，unalienable同义）

quiz.question: amenable __ ______
quiz.explanation: 顺从的，顺从理性。He was amenable to reason. 他顺从理性。 | amener->引导（法语，拉丁ad+minare），amenable->可以被引导的=顺从的（cf. amenity便利，amend修改，manage管理，mansion大宅）

quiz.question: tenable ________
quiz.explanation: 站得住脚的，站得住脚的论点。She presented a tenable argument. 她提出了站得住脚的论点。 | ten->持（拉丁tenere），tenable->可以持守的=站得住脚的（cf. tenant租户，tenure任期，maintain维持，tenacious顽强，untenable站不住脚）
